jiujiu.title: Quick Relief Self-Care Course
jiujiu.subtitle: Fast Relief for Common Daily Discomforts. 4 Simple Acupoint Routines, 5-10 Minutes Each, Instant Comfort at Home.
jiujiu.switchLessons: Switch lessons above to see details for each
jiujiu.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This program is for wellness purposes only and is not medical advice. Please consult a qualified healthcare professional if you have any health concerns.
jiujiu.selectLesson: Select a lesson above to play.

lesson1.title: Lower Back Pain Relief
lesson1.subtitle: Fast Relief • 3 Acupoints • Feel Better Fast
lesson1.intro:
Suffering from stubborn lower back pain? Tired of temporary relief from creams and treatments?

This course helps you quickly relax tight muscles, release tension, and ease discomfort with 3 powerful acupressure points.

No tools, no help needed. Just 10–20 minutes a day.

Follow Master Qing Ji and feel warmth, relaxation, and relief in minutes.
lesson1.closing: One purchase → lifetime access. Practice anytime, feel better fast.

lesson2.title: Neck & Shoulder Relief
lesson2.subtitle: Release Tension • Move Freely • Fast Relief
lesson2.intro:
Stiff neck? Tight shoulders? Heavy, painful, hard to move?

This routine helps you release tension quickly and unlock tight neck & shoulders.

Just 10 minutes a day.

Follow along and feel instant relief—no force, no equipment.
lesson2.closing: One purchase → lifetime access. Unlock your neck & shoulders in minutes.

lesson3.title: Sleep & Calm Support
lesson3.subtitle: 10-Min Bedtime Routine • Fall Asleep Faster
lesson3.intro:
Tossing, turning, racing thoughts? Can't fall asleep?

This bedtime routine calms your mind fast and helps you sleep deeper—naturally.

10 minutes in bed. No pills, no devices.

Fall asleep quicker, wake up less.
lesson3.closing: One purchase → lifetime access. Sleep better tonight.

lesson4.title: Men's Health & Vitality
lesson4.subtitle: Male Wellness • Natural Support • Restore Energy
lesson4.intro:
Feeling low energy? Struggling with vitality and wellness concerns?

This course helps you understand men's physiological health and learn scientific self-care methods to improve quality of life.

Just 10-15 minutes a day.

Follow along and restore your natural vitality—safe, natural, effective.
lesson4.closing: One purchase → lifetime access. Restore your vitality naturally.
